staked\" if caller has no position."},"test_claimRevenue_transfersExactAmount()":{"notice":"claimRevenue() transfers the exact pending USDC amount to the staker."},"test_clawPass_approve_reverts()":{"notice":"approve() must revert for ClawPass."},"test_clawPass_burnedOnUnstake()":{"notice":"ownerOf() reverts for a passId after unstake burns the NFT."},"test_clawPass_nonTransferable_safeTransferFrom()":{"notice":"safeTransferFrom() between two non-zero addresses must revert."},"test_clawPass_nonTransferable_transferFrom()":{"notice":"transferFrom() between two non-zero addresses must revert."},"test_clawPass_setApprovalForAll_reverts()":{"notice":"setApprovalForAll() must revert for ClawPass."},"test_event_feeNotified()":{"notice":"notifyFee() emits FeeNotified(notifier, amount)."},"test_event_feeNotifierSet()":{"notice":"setFeeNotifier() emits FeeNotifierSet(notifier, enabled)."},"test_event_revenueClaimed()":{"notice":"claimRevenue() emits RevenueClaimed(staker, amount)."},"test_event_staked()":{"notice":"stake() emits Staked(staker, amount, totalStaked)."},"test_event_unstaked()":{"notice":"unstake() emits Unstaked(staker, amount)."},"test_feeNotifier_setAndRevoke()":{"notice":"Enabling a notifier allows fee notification; disabling it causes a revert."},"test_lockRemaining_afterUnlock()":{"notice":"lockRemaining returns 0 once the lock period has fully elapsed."},"test_lockRemaining_freshStake()":{"notice":"lockRemaining immediately after staking is approximately LOCK_PERIOD (within 1 sec)."},"test_lockRemaining_halfwayThrough()":{"notice":"lockRemaining after 15 days of a 30-day lock is approximately 15 days."},"test_lockRemaining_noPosition()":{"notice":"lockRemaining for an address with no position returns 0."},"test_notifyFee_revertsUnauthorised()":{"notice":"A non-authorised caller invoking notifyFee must revert."},"test_notifyFee_revertsZeroFee()":{"notice":"notifyFee(0) must revert with \"Zero fee\"."},"test_restake_afterUnstake_getsNewPassId()":{"notice":"After unstake then restake, the new passId is the next sequential ID."},"test_revenueShare_claimThenEarnMore()":{"notice":"After claiming, subsequent fees increase pendingRevenue again from zero."},"test_revenueShare_dustFee_noInflation()":{"notice":"A 1-wei fee with 1,000,000 CLAW staked rounds to 0 pending \u2014 no revert, no inflation."},"test_revenueShare_feeBeforeStaker_unallocatedThenDistributed()":{"notice":"Fee arriving before any staker accumulates in unallocatedFees, then is distributed         to the first staker when the next fee arrives."},"test_revenueShare_fiveStakers_exact()":{"notice":"Five stakers: alice=1000, bob=2000, charlie=3000, dave=4000, eve=5000.         Each receives proportional share; total distributed == fee (dust tolerance 4 wei)."},"test_revenueShare_lateJoiner_doesNotEarnPreviousFees()":{"notice":"Late joiner (bob) must not earn fees that were distributed before his stake."},"test_revenueShare_multipleFeeBatches_noLeak()":{"notice":"Multiple fee batches for a single staker accumulate correctly without leakage."},"test_revenueShare_singleStaker_getsAll()":{"notice":"A single staker receives 100% of any notified fee."},"test_revenueShare_twoStakers_25_75()":{"notice":"25/75 split: alice=1000 CLAW, bob=3000 CLAW, fee=100 USDC."},"test_revenueShare_twoStakers_50_50()":{"notice":"Two stakers with equal stakes receive equal shares."},"test_setBaseURI_onlyOwner()":{"notice":"setBaseURI() reverts when called by a non-owner."},"test_setBaseURI_updatesTokenURI()":{"notice":"setBaseURI() sets the base URI and tokenURI reflects it."},"test_stake_firstStake_passIdIs1()":{"notice":"The first ever pass minted must have ID 1 (nextPassId starts at 1)."},"test_stake_mintsClawPass()":{"notice":"Staking mints a ClawPass NFT to the staker; hasPass is true; totalStaked updated."},"test_stake_multipleTimes_samePeriod()":{"notice":"Three stakes in the same block are all accumulated into one position."},"test_stake_revertsWithoutApproval()":{"notice":"Staking without prior ERC-20 approval must revert."},"test_stake_revertsZero()":{"notice":"stake(0) must revert with \"Cannot stake 0\"."},"test_stake_topUp_restartsLock()":{"notice":"Top-up restarts the lock: stakedAt is updated to the current block timestamp."},"test_stake_topUp_samePassId()":{"notice":"A top-up to an existing position must NOT mint a new pass; passId is unchanged."},"test_stake_topUp_summedCorrectly()":{"notice":"Top-up amounts are summed correctly in position.staked."},"test_totalStaked_sumOfAllPositions()":{"notice":"totalStaked equals the sum of all individual positions."},"test_unstake_afterLock_returnsExactAmount()":{"notice":"Unstaking after LOCK_PERIOD returns the exact amount of CLAW staked."},"test_unstake_burnsClaPass()":{"notice":"Unstaking burns the ClawPass NFT; ownerOf() reverts for the burned tokenId."},"test_unstake_clearsPosition()":{"notice":"After unstaking the position is fully cleared: staked=0, hasPass=false, passId=0."},"test_unstake_revertsBeforeLock_oneSec()":{"notice":"Unstaking one second before the lock expires must revert with \"Still locked\"."},"test_unstake_revertsNothingStaked()":{"notice":"Unstaking with no active position must revert with \"Nothing staked\"."},"test_unstake_settlesRevenueBefore()":{"notice":"Unstake settles pending revenue: alice receives USDC before position is cleared."},"test_withdrawUnallocatedFees_onlyOwner()":{"notice":"withdrawUnallocatedFees() reverts when called by a non-owner."},"test_withdrawUnallocatedFees_revertsIfZero()":{"notice":"withdrawUnallocatedFees() reverts when there are no unallocated fees."},"test_withdrawUnallocatedFees_whenFeeArrived()":{"notice":"withdrawUnallocatedFees() sends the fee to the recipient when fees are unallocated."}},"notice":"Comprehensive happy-path and mathematical-correctness test suite for ClawStreetStaking.         Covers staking, unstaking, lock periods, soul-bound NFTs, revenue share,         fee notification, admin functions, events, and fuzz targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

testFuzz_revenueShareNoInflation(uint96,.notice: Revenue share between alice and bob never inflates: total pending ≤ fee.

testFuzz_stakeAndUnstake(uint96).notice: Stake any valid amount, warp past lock, unstake — exact amount returned.

test_claimRevenue_idempotent_secondClaim.notice: A second claimRevenue() call (with no new fees) transfers 0 and does not revert.

test_claimRevenue_revertsIfNotStaking().notice: claimRevenue() reverts with "Nothing staked" if caller has no position.

test_claimRevenue_transfersExactAmount().notice: claimRevenue() transfers the exact pending USDC amount to the staker.

test_clawPass_burnedOnUnstake().notice: ownerOf() reverts for a passId after unstake burns the NFT.

test_clawPass_nonTransferable_safeTransf.notice: safeTransferFrom() between two non-zero addresses must revert.

test_clawPass_nonTransferable_transferFr.notice: transferFrom() between two non-zero addresses must revert.

test_feeNotifier_setAndRevoke().notice: Enabling a notifier allows fee notification; disabling it causes a revert.

test_lockRemaining_afterUnlock().notice: lockRemaining returns 0 once the lock period has fully elapsed.

test_lockRemaining_freshStake().notice: lockRemaining immediately after staking is approximately LOCK_PERIOD (within 1 sec).

test_lockRemaining_halfwayThrough().notice: lockRemaining after 15 days of a 30-day lock is approximately 15 days.

test_lockRemaining_noPosition().notice: lockRemaining for an address with no position returns 0.

test_notifyFee_revertsUnauthorised().notice: A non-authorised caller invoking notifyFee must revert.

test_restake_afterUnstake_getsNewPassId(.notice: After unstake then restake, the new passId is the next sequential ID.

test_revenueShare_claimThenEarnMore().notice: After claiming, subsequent fees increase pendingRevenue again from zero.

test_revenueShare_dustFee_noInflation().notice: A 1-wei fee with 1,000,000 CLAW staked rounds to 0 pending — no revert, no inflation.

test_revenueShare_feeBeforeStaker_unallo.notice: Fee arriving before any staker accumulates in unallocatedFees, then is distributed         to the first staker when the next fee arrives.

test_revenueShare_fiveStakers_exact().notice: Five stakers: alice=1000, bob=2000, charlie=3000, dave=4000, eve=5000.         Each receives proportional share; total distributed == fee (dust tolerance 4 wei).

test_revenueShare_lateJoiner_doesNotEarn.notice: Late joiner (bob) must not earn fees that were distributed before his stake.

test_revenueShare_multipleFeeBatches_noL.notice: Multiple fee batches for a single staker accumulate correctly without leakage.

test_revenueShare_singleStaker_getsAll().notice: A single staker receives 100% of any notified fee.

test_revenueShare_twoStakers_25_75().notice: 25/75 split: alice=1000 CLAW, bob=3000 CLAW, fee=100 USDC.

test_revenueShare_twoStakers_50_50().notice: Two stakers with equal stakes receive equal shares.

test_setBaseURI_onlyOwner().notice: setBaseURI() reverts when called by a non-owner.

test_setBaseURI_updatesTokenURI().notice: setBaseURI() sets the base URI and tokenURI reflects it.

test_stake_firstStake_passIdIs1().notice: The first ever pass minted must have ID 1 (nextPassId starts at 1).

test_stake_mintsClawPass().notice: Staking mints a ClawPass NFT to the staker; hasPass is true; totalStaked updated.

test_stake_multipleTimes_samePeriod().notice: Three stakes in the same block are all accumulated into one position.

test_stake_revertsWithoutApproval().notice: Staking without prior ERC-20 approval must revert.

test_stake_topUp_restartsLock().notice: Top-up restarts the lock: stakedAt is updated to the current block timestamp.

test_stake_topUp_samePassId().notice: A top-up to an existing position must NOT mint a new pass; passId is unchanged.

test_stake_topUp_summedCorrectly().notice: Top-up amounts are summed correctly in position.staked.

test_totalStaked_sumOfAllPositions().notice: totalStaked equals the sum of all individual positions.

test_unstake_afterLock_returnsExactAmoun.notice: Unstaking after LOCK_PERIOD returns the exact amount of CLAW staked.

test_unstake_burnsClaPass().notice: Unstaking burns the ClawPass NFT; ownerOf() reverts for the burned tokenId.

test_unstake_clearsPosition().notice: After unstaking the position is fully cleared: staked=0, hasPass=false, passId=0.

test_unstake_revertsBeforeLock_oneSec().notice: Unstaking one second before the lock expires must revert with "Still locked".

test_unstake_revertsNothingStaked().notice: Unstaking with no active position must revert with "Nothing staked".

test_unstake_settlesRevenueBefore().notice: Unstake settles pending revenue: alice receives USDC before position is cleared.

test_withdrawUnallocatedFees_onlyOwner().notice: withdrawUnallocatedFees() reverts when called by a non-owner.

test_withdrawUnallocatedFees_revertsIfZe.notice: withdrawUnallocatedFees() reverts when there are no unallocated fees.

test_withdrawUnallocatedFees_whenFeeArri.notice: withdrawUnallocatedFees() sends the fee to the recipient when fees are unallocated.
